mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.name AS "name", a.code AS "code", a.sort AS "sort", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_express( id, name, code, sort, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{code}, #{sort}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
